privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/citation_network. There are exactly 19 tests across test_graph.py (4), test_metrics.py (8), test_community.py (3), and test_io.py (4). The scoring is: PageRank (20), Betweenness (20), Clustering (15), Community (15), I/O (20), and No Regression (10). A passing score requires 60 or more points. The sample dataset is a slice of the real SNAP Cit-HepTh citation network.
